meta.description: Designer plugin E2E test cases. Verifies agent routing (designer:design-review, designer:ui), skill invocation via Skill tool (designer:compare, designer:ui-analyse, designer:design-references), slash command parsing, and cross-plugin awareness with the dev plugin.
meta.notes: v1.0: Initial test suite covering agent-routing (4), skill-routing (3), command-parsing (3), cross-plugin (2). Designer plugin v0.2.0 with agents: design-review, ui; commands: review, ui, create-style; skills: compare, ui-analyse, design-references, ui-style-format, ui-design-review.

test_cases.description: Explicit designer:design-review agent request should be honored
test_cases.prompt: Use the designer:design-review agent to compare these two screenshots: reference.png and actual.png. Analyze visual differences and report what does not match.

test_cases.description: Implicit design comparison task should route to designer:design-review via CLAUDE.md routing
test_cases.prompt: Compare my Figma design against the live implementation at localhost:3000 and tell me what's different. Focus on layout, colors, spacing, and typography.

test_cases.description: Explicit designer:ui agent request should be honored
test_cases.prompt: Use the designer:ui agent to review the usability and accessibility of this page. Check for WCAG compliance issues and design system violations.

test_cases.description: Implicit UI design review task should route to designer:ui agent
test_cases.prompt: Review the UI design of my homepage for accessibility issues and design system violations. Check contrast ratios, touch targets, and component consistency.

test_cases.description: Explicit designer:compare skill should be invoked via Skill tool, not Task
test_cases.prompt: Use the designer:compare skill to understand how to run pixel-diff comparison between two screenshots. Just load the skill and report what approach it describes.

test_cases.description: Explicit designer:ui-analyse skill should be invoked via Skill tool, not Task
test_cases.prompt: Use the designer:ui-analyse skill for visual analysis patterns. Load the skill and summarize what visual analysis methodology it describes.

test_cases.description: Explicit designer:design-references skill should be invoked via Skill tool, not Task
test_cases.prompt: Load the designer:design-references skill to check Material Design 3 guidelines. Just load the skill and report what design reference systems it covers.

test_cases.description: Slash command /designer:review should invoke the review command skill
Slash command /designer:ui should invoke the ui command skill
Slash command /designer:create-style should invoke the create-style command skill
dev:frontend agent should be aware of designer plugin for design review tasks
test_cases.prompt: I need to implement UI improvements based on a design review. Use the dev:frontend agent.

test_cases.description: Browser UI debugging should be handled directly or by a dev agent, not necessarily designer
test_cases.prompt: Debug the UI rendering issues on my page using browser debugging tools
